name: Pena Arrabbiata Sweeney
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a sauce pot over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic and cook until translucent.
3. Add red pepper flakes and vodka. Reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes.
4. Add canned tomatoes with juice. Increase heat to high and break up the tomatoes with a spoon. Cook for about 5 minutes.
5. Stir in heavy cream and salt. Cook until the sauce begins to thicken (approximately 5 minutes).
6. Toss with cooked penne pasta. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese and serve.
